title: UX/UI Design
description:
Job Title – UX/UI Design

Candidate Location - Singapore

Start Date – ASAP

12 Months plus contract


Core Responsibilities

Design and refine digital twin interfaces
Create intuitive dashboards and visualisations for our factory digital twin. This includes 2D data views and status dashboards (and 3D equipment views, if applicable) used on desktop and large displays in control rooms.

Improve existing factory and automation tools
Audit and optimise current user interfaces for clarity, navigation and task flow, with a focus on reducing errors and cognitive load for operators.

Understand users in a factory environment
Work directly with engineers, operators and managers. When possible, visit the factory floor to observe real workflows and constraints such as PPE, lighting, noise and time pressure, and use these insights to inform design decisions.

Prototype and validate designs
Use tools such as Figma, Sketch or Adobe XD to produce wireframes, high fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes. Plan and run usability tests or pilot sessions, then iterate based on findings.

Shape and apply a unified design language
Contribute to a shared design system for our industrial tools. Ensure consistent layouts, typography, color usage and interaction patterns across multiple applications.

Collaborate closely with engineers and product
Work with software and HMI engineers, as well as product managers, to understand technical constraints and data flows. Communicate design rationale clearly and support implementation through specifications and regular design reviews.

Must Have Skills

Complex, data heavy interfaces
Proven experience as a UI/UX designer, with a portfolio that includes dashboards, monitoring tools or other complex, data intensive applications.

Visual and interaction design
Strong skills in layout, hierarchy, typography and colour systems, and in defining interaction patterns that support real operational workflows.

Design and prototyping tools
Proficiency with modern design tools such as Figma, Sketch or Adobe XD, including wireframes, high fidelity designs and interactive prototypes.

User research and usability testing
Solid grasp of user centred design. Experience conducting user interviews or observations, planning and running usability tests, and translating insights into improved designs.

Communication and collaboration
Ability to explain design decisions to engineers, product managers and non design stakeholders. Comfortable working in ross functional teams and incorporating feedback while maintaining clarity and coherence in the design.

Accessibility and industrial usability awareness
Awareness of accessibility basics such as color contrast and legibility, and sensitivity to factory realities such as glare, noise, PPE and time pressure.

Good to Have Skills:

Industrial or real time systems experience
Familiarity with interfaces such as factory control dashboards, Human-Machine Interface screens, or digital twin visualization used to monitor live operations.

Understanding of implementation constraints
Basic knowledge of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and or HMI development platforms, enough to discuss feasibility and performance trade offs with engineers. This knowledge is used for collaboration, not full time development work.

Design system experience
Experience creating, extending or maintaining a design system or style guide across multiple applications and teams.

Data visualization
Experience designing charts, status indicators and alarm states that make complex data easy to scan and interpret quickly.

postedCompany.description:
We are a team of young professionals with an entrepreneurial mindset come together to redefine the talent that accelerate innovation, growth, and sustainability of the business.


We live in a world of complexity and uncertainty, whether its economy or business. And its technology that drives constant change. A business needs the right people, working collaboratively and effectively and that’s where we come in.


Exa- is a new brand that is locally breaded with an international exposure. We bring in a strong persuasion, collaborating with the expertise and network of professionals across IT.


We value and believe in our team, and we start with understanding a candidate’s ambitions. Aspiring ahead with them by - coaching, guiding, investing in their training, and upskilling throughout their career.
